---
title: "Streamlining Fuel Payments: Applegreen's Smart Tag Solution"
subtitle: "*Applegreen Group Assignment*"
description: "Group project proposes Applegreen fuel tag innovation for choosy shoppers/traditionalists: app-based pay-at-pump to cut time, drive-offs, staff needs."
categories: [Management, Year 1]
date: '2022-12-20'
author: 
    - "Conor Jordan" 
    - "Martinas Jucys Brady" 
    - "Ana Kennedy" 
    - "Leon Kennedy" 
    - "Ciaran Kiely"  
    - "Charlotte Kiernan" 
    - "Jack Lacey"
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-title: "On this page"
    cite-method: citeproc

about:
  template: solana

---
